title: pelargonium × savii
intro: Pelargonium × savii, also known as Cape Geranium, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Geraniaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cape Geranium include relief from digestive issues, reduction of fever, and alleviation of anxiety and stress. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is often used to make medicinal products such as capsules and topical creams.
